name: Memory (MuninnDB)
description: Cognitive memory powered by MuninnDB — Ebbinghaus decay, Hebbian learning, and semantic activation for AI agents

baseUrl.label: MuninnDB URL
baseUrl.help: Base URL of the MuninnDB server

token.label: API Token
token.placeholder: (optional — leave empty if auth is disabled)

vault.label: Vault
vault.help: MuninnDB vault name to use for this agent's memories

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into agent context before each turn

syncFiles.label: Sync Memory Files
syncFiles.help: Sync MEMORY.md and memory/*.md files to MuninnDB as engrams
